data.title: OKX Wallet exclusively launches RCADE Network airdrop query and token TGE activities
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, OKX Wallet has opened an exclusive RCADE Network airdrop query. Users can query the airdrop quota through OKX Wallet before TGE on July 9, 2025. In addition, OKX Wallet users can also complete verification on the OKX Wallet TGE Express before 17:00 (UTC+8) on July 5, 2025. After passing the verification, they will have priority to participate in RACDE TGE. The event will be launched on the FjordFoundry platform at 22:00 (UTC+8) on July 7.
OKX Wallet is the world's leading Web3 portal, covering 130+ mainstream public chains and widely serving 50 million users worldwide, providing them with a one-stop on-chain exploration experience including wallets, DEX, and NFT markets. RCADE Network is a game ecosystem based on Abritrum. Investors include Pantera Capital, Animoca, Rockstar founder Dan Houser, etc.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Transfers 1,000 ETH to Internal Address
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the Ethereum Foundation's development team has transferred 1,000 ETH, valued at approximately $2.55 million, to an internal address identified as 0xc061...0B6d. This address currently holds 16,000 ETH, with an estimated value of $40.8 million.

data.title: China Asset Management: We will continue to launch more tokenized fund products in the future and promote the secondary circulation of tokenized funds on compliant platforms
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: China Asset Management participated in the stablecoin sandbox test, covering the issuance, payment, asset docking and fund redemption of stablecoins. China Asset Management said that it will continue to launch more tokenized fund products in the future, promote the secondary circulation of tokenized funds on compliant trading platforms, explore the use of digital currencies such as stablecoins and digital Hong Kong dollars for settlement, and optimize the efficiency of on-chain fund transactions. (Financial World)

data.title: Binance Launches 11th Project on BNSOL Super Stake with Pixels (PIXEL)
data.description: Binance announced the 11th project on BNSOL Super Stake with Pixels (PIXEL), a social casual web3 game powered by the Ronin Network.From July 7, 2025 00:00 (UTC) to August 7, 2025 23:59 (UTC), users who do the following will receive PIXEL APR Boost Airdrop Rewards:Binance Account - Hold BNSOL or stake SOL into BNSOL; orBinance Wallet - Hold any of the DeFi BNSOL Assets: BNSOL, sBNSOL, bzSOLThe PIXEL APR Boost Airdrop Rewards are additional token airdrops given on top of the base APR from Binance SOL Staking, providing an extra boost of higher APR to users’ earnings.

data.description:
A long-dormant Bitcoin wallet dating back to the early days of the cryptocurrency has just moved 10,000 BTC, worth approximately $1.
source: https://finbold.com/satoshi-era-bitcoin-address-moves-10000-btc-worth-1-billion-after-14-years/

data.title: Central Bank: Increase efforts to replicate and promote the "Shanghai Experience" and support the promotion of innovative applications of digital RMB to relevant free trade pilot zones
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Ji Min, head of the Research Bureau of the People's Bank of China, said at the regular policy briefing of the State Council on July 4 that in the next step, the People's Bank of China will work with relevant departments and other financial management departments to continue to support the free trade pilot zone to deepen the connection with international high-standard economic and trade rules and promote higher-level institutional opening on the basis of effectively preventing risks. On the one hand, further deepen financial openness and innovation in the Shanghai Free Trade Pilot Zone. Not long ago, eight support policies were announced at the Lujiazui Forum, including the development of free trade offshore bonds, the optimization and upgrading of free trade account functions, and the pilot of comprehensive reform of offshore trade financial services. On the other hand, we must increase the replication and promotion of the "Shanghai Experience", support the promotion of innovative applications of digital RMB and other measures to relevant free trade pilot zones, and promote measures such as optimizing electronic payment services to the whole country, explore practical paths for the open and innovative development of my country's financial sector, and accumulate more replicable and popularizable experience. (China Net)

data.title: Robinhood CEO Defends AI, SpaceX Token Giveaways After OpenAI Backlash
data.description:
Catenaa, July 4, 2025- Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev defended the firm’s tokenized stock initiative on Thursday, clarifying that new digital assets linked to OpenAI and SpaceX are blockchain-based derivatives and not actual equity. The explanation follows OpenAI’s public criticism, where the Sam Altman-led company stated it had not authorized Robinhood to distribute tokens that track […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/robinhood-ceo-defends-ai-spacex-token-giveaways-after-openai-backlash

data.title: Three core proposals for BTFS ecosystem governance have been implemented
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to BitTorrent official news, the three key governance proposals of the BTFS network, BTIP-89/90/91, have entered the final implementation stage. Among them, BTIP-91 establishes a decentralized governance framework based on smart contracts, BTIP-90 realizes transparent on-chain management of file metadata, and BTIP-89 introduces a professional storage service provider (SPs) mechanism. This upgrade will significantly improve the transparency, reliability and community autonomy of the network, marking a key step for BTFS towards a fully decentralized storage infrastructure.

data.title: BitMart launches PowerDrop, a zero-threshold airdrop mechanism to strengthen user empowerment
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Official news, cryptocurrency trading platform BitMart today officially launched a new equity-based airdrop product - PowerDrop, providing users with a lower threshold and more convenient airdrop participation mechanism to easily obtain high-quality assets.
PowerDrop supports users to obtain tickets through transactions, invitations or VIP levels, and share the project token airdrop in an open and transparent lottery mechanism. The first phase of the event has been launched simultaneously, with a total airdrop amount of 30,000USDT equivalent to RZR. The qualification verification phase will officially start at 18:00 (UTC+8) on July 4.
The launch of PowerDrop further strengthens BitMart's strategic layout in user empowerment and early asset discovery. The platform will continue to build an open and co-built value discovery platform through high-frequency and high-quality linkage of high-quality projects.

data.title: Lorenzo Launches USD1+ OTF Testnet on BNB Chain
data.description:
According to Odaily, blockchain asset management platform Lorenzo has introduced its first On-chain Traded Fund (OTF) testnet product, USD1+ OTF, on the BNB Chain testnet. This marks Lorenzo's initial offering settled in USD1 stablecoin, focusing on USD-based yield products. Supported by Lorenzo's Financial Abstraction Layer, the product integrates returns from Real World Assets (RWA), quantitative strategies, and DeFi, all settled in USD1. Lorenzo is among the pioneers in developing real yield products centered around USD1, enhancing its practical use in the on-chain financial ecosystem.

Users can participate in the product testing by staking USDT, USDC, or USD1 to receive sUSD1+ tokens, representing yield rights, and experience a stable, diverse, and genuine yield structure. Lorenzo aims to establish an on-chain investment bank, specializing in standardized issuance, tokenized management, and fundraising services for yield-generating assets in CeFi, RWA, and DeFi sectors, bridging large-scale on-chain funds with institutional-grade financial products.

data.title: Ronin and Drip Launch Pokémon Slab NFT Series
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Ronin has partnered with the card trading platform Drip to introduce the Pokémon Slab NFT series. Each NFT in this collection represents a physical Pokémon card. Users can exchange their NFTs through Drip to receive the corresponding physical card at their location.

data.title: Mystonks and DeBox Forge Strategic Partnership to Enhance Digital Securities and Web3 Social Interaction
data.description:
According to Odaily, decentralized U.S. stock token trading platform Mystonks has announced a strategic partnership with Web3 social giant DeBox. The collaboration aims to enhance user growth, community ecosystems, and resource sharing, fostering innovation in digital securities and Web3 social interactions for global users. This partnership promises a richer experience in digital asset investment and community engagement.

On the product front, DeBox's discovery page now allows direct trading of U.S. stock tokens via Mystonks. Mystonks currently boasts over 10,000 registered users and supports 146 mainstream U.S. stocks and ETF spot tokens. The platform is set to launch derivatives trading based on the U.S. stock market, enabling T+0 on-chain transactions using stablecoins like USDT and USDC.

DeBox, a prominent platform in the Web3 social domain, has over 10.6 million registered users, 640,000 daily active users, and more than 270,000 communities. The platform has accumulated a trading volume exceeding $600 million. Its AI-driven Bot ecosystem and comprehensive community tools offer new and mobile users efficient and convenient on-chain social and asset management experiences.

data.title: Ethereum's Growth Catalysts Highlighted by Former Developer
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, former Ethereum core developer Eric Conner recently identified three major catalysts for Ethereum's growth. Stablecoins have been continuously injecting dollars into Ethereum for 21 months, with monthly transaction volumes now comparable to Visa. These stablecoins act as an on-chain cash engine, driving sustained demand for ETH block space.

Additionally, spot ETH ETFs saw a net inflow of $1.17 billion in June alone. Fund managers anticipate that the scale of ETH ETFs will multiply by the second half of 2025.

Furthermore, centralized exchange balances have dropped to 9 million ETH, marking the lowest level since 2015.

Eric Conner noted that Ethereum has been fluctuating between $2,400 and $2,600 for several weeks, with reduced trading volumes and subtle highs and lows. Long-term consolidation often leads to significant volatility. Therefore, if ETH decisively breaks through the $2,600 mark, the movement could be rapid and intense.

data.title: Ethereum Tests $2.6K as Political Heat Rises on Fed Chair Powell
data.description:
Ethereum builds bullish momentum as Senator Lummis slams Fed Chair Powell, fueling crypto’s anti-establishment narrative ahead of key resistance levels.

The post Ethereum Tests $2. 6K as Political Heat Rises on Fed Chair Powell first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/07/04/ethereum-tests-2-6-political-heat/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=ethereum-tests-2-6-political-heat

data.title: Lorenzo launches the testnet product USD1+ OTF, the first on-chain real income fund based on USD1
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Lorenzo, an on-chain asset management platform, officially launched its first OTF (On-chain Traded Fund) testnet product, USD1+ OTF, which is also its first U-based income product with USD1 stablecoin as the settlement unit. It has been deployed on the BNB Chain testnet.
This product is supported by the Financial Abstraction Layer developed by Lorenzo, which will integrate the three major sources of RWA income, quantitative strategies and DeFi income. All income will be settled in USD1. Lorenzo has therefore become one of the earliest projects to build real income products around USD1, promoting the actual use of USD1 in the on-chain financial ecosystem.
Users can participate in product testing by staking USDT, USDC or USD1, obtain sUSD1+ tokens representing income rights, and experience a stable, diversified and real income structure.
Lorenzo's future vision is to build an on-chain investment bank, focusing on providing standardized issuance, tokenization management and fundraising services for income-based assets such as CeFi, RWA, DeFi, and building a bridge between large-scale funds on the chain and institutional-level wealth management products.
